component.name: Haptic Harmony Simulator
component.summary: Haptic Harmony Ring Simulator for developers

description.p: Advanced haptic ring simulation with BLE peripheral emulation. Features modern Tauri GUI with modular ring support (B1, A1, P1), cross-platform compatibility, and real-time gesture recognition with haptic feedback.
Perfect for developers working with Gestura's Haptic Harmony Ring ecosystem. Test your applications without physical hardware, simulate various ring models, and debug BLE communication protocols.
Initial release of Haptic Harmony Simulator

ul.li: Advanced haptic ring simulation with BLE peripheral emulation
Modern Tauri GUI with modular ring support (B1, A1, P1)
Real-time gesture recognition and haptic feedback
